problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to —, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
